documents.title: Do you ship internationally?
documents.text: Q: Do you ship internationally?. A: Yes. International shipping is available for selected regions, with shipping fees calculated at checkout.

documents.title: How long does delivery take?
documents.text: Q: How long does delivery take?. A: Local delivery usually takes 2-4 business days. International delivery ranges from 7-14 business days.

documents.title: Can I return a product?
documents.text: Q: Can I return a product?. A: You can request a return within 14 days if the product is unused and in original condition.
